emails.subject: Re: Financial Products in Japan
emails.body: Thanks, I appreciate it! What should I do with the Japanese counterparty on the 9/26/00 list? Shut them down for all trading on Japan based products until I hear from you? Will you be coming to the Legal Conference here in Houston next week? Maybe we could chat then?! Jane McBride@ENRON 09/27/2000 09:46 AM
